customToolsPrompt:
## Custom Tools

You have access to additional custom tools beyond the built-in tools listed above. Custom tools are user-defined extensions that provide specialized functionality.

To use custom tools:
1. Call `custom_tool_manager` with action "list" to see all available custom tools with brief descriptions
2. Call `custom_tool_manager` with action "get" and names array to retrieve full definitions for specific tools
3. Once you have the definition, you can call that custom tool directly by name with the required arguments

IMPORTANT: Custom tools are fully callable even though they are not in the initial tool list. After fetching a tool's definition via custom_tool_manager, call it directly as you would any other tool.

Example workflow:
1. custom_tool_manager({"action": "list"}) -> returns list of available custom tools
2. custom_tool_manager({"action": "get", "names": ["my_tool"]}) -> returns full definition with inputSchema
3. my_tool({"param1": "value"}) -> execute the custom tool directly
